finding_results.notes: Compressed the opening evidence review into one case-assembly sequence, folded the corrections-grid payoff into that single pass, and returned to the six-AM household pressure before Tommy's entrance.
The casserole stays sealed and untouched in the refrigerator, Mallick does not leave reheating instructions or offer it to the men, and she leaves the house still carrying it.

Chapter 18 now uses only two refrigerator references and removes the cycling/arthritic sound language, but the manuscript-wide refrigerator-instance target cannot be completed from a single-chapter revision.
Retained both Chapter 18 loon calls as directed. The broader manuscript-count reduction belongs to edits outside this chapter.
Removed the repeated narrator labels that routed Joel through his profession and let his questions, restraint, and argument carry the scene instead.
Reduced Chapter 18 to the two continuity-bearing refrigerator mentions and cut all cycling-sound descriptions.

summary: Rebuilt the opening into one sharper evidentiary setup, moved the chapter back under Tommy's imminent arrival sooner, removed the mechanical refrigerator and Joel-lawyer repetition, and restored casserole continuity by keeping the dish sealed until Mallick leaves with it. Cross-chapter motif-reduction findings remain partial where their manuscript-wide targets require edits outside Chapter 18.
